case_title: KAI X GUAN VS. MARLENE LARGAESPADA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUAN, KAI X AS TO DEFENDANT LARGAESPADA, MARLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUAN, KAI X IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LARGAESPADA, MARLENE **** THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE IMPACT OF THE ALLEGED COLLISION DID NOT CAUSE BODILY INJURY TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-11-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARGAESPADA, MARLENE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2010 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
